seoTitle: 150/750 Mirror for Smallest - Primary Tested + 35mm Secondary | La 3ème dimension
seoDescription: 150mm f/5 parabolic primary mirror tested with interferometer + 35mm secondary mirror for Smallest telescope. Bevel mask included for primary.
seoKeywords: 150mm mirror, parabolic mirror, 35mm secondary mirror, smallest, newton telescope, interferometer, bevel mask, astronomical optics

structuredData.name: 150/750 Parabolic Primary + 35mm Secondary Mirror for Smallest
structuredData.description: Complete set with 150mm f/5 parabolic primary mirror tested with interferometer and 35mm secondary mirror for Smallest telescope. The primary is delivered with its bevel mask.

data.title: 150/750 Mirror for Smallest
data.description: Complete set of industrial optics for Smallest telescope: 150mm parabolic primary mirror with f/5 ratio (750mm focal length) tested with interferometer + 35mm secondary mirror. The primary mirror is delivered with its bevel mask to protect the edges during assembly. Only the primary mirror is tested with interferometer. Industrial product.

heroImage.alt: 150/750 Parabolic Mirror for Smallest telescope - Interferometer tested primary and 35mm secondary

images.alt: 150/750 Mirror for Smallest - Complete primary and secondary set
images.caption: Complete set: 150mm f/5 primary + 35mm secondary mirror

features.title: Primary tested with interferometer
features.description: The industrially manufactured primary mirror is tested with interferometer to guarantee optical surface quality. Surface defects are measured and documented. Note: only the primary mirror is tested.

features.title: Complete primary + secondary set
features.description: Industrial optics: 150mm f/5 parabolic primary mirror + 35mm secondary mirror. The primary offers an ideal ratio for deep sky observation with aluminized surface.

features.title: Primary protection
features.description: The primary mirror is delivered with its bevel mask to protect the edges during assembly in the Smallest telescope.

features.title: Designed for Smallest
features.description: Dimensions and specifications of both mirrors optimized for perfect integration into the Smallest telescope.

options.title: Industrial product
options.description: Industrially manufactured optics. Quality controlled by interferometer testing of primary mirror.

options.title: Quality guarantee
options.description: The primary mirror is tested and delivered with its interferometry report.
